ground_truth_facts.fact: User is training to complete a 10K run in under 55 minutes
User has a 10K race scheduled in March
User has recurring shin splints in the left leg
User prefers outdoor morning runs and dislikes running on treadmills
User follows a strict vegan diet and practices yoga three times a week
User experiences persistent performance anxiety and nervousness before races and competitions

conversation_messages: I signed up for a 10K in March. My goal is to finish under 55 minutes. Currently running around 62-63 minutes so I need to shave off about 7-8 mins.
My biggest enemy right now is shin splints — left leg specifically. It flares up whenever I increase my mileage too fast.
I'm vegan so I need to be careful about protein sources. No meat, no eggs, no dairy. I eat a lot of lentils, tofu, and tempeh.
I love running outside in the morning — fresh air, cooler temperatures. I genuinely hate treadmills, they feel soul-crushing.
I do yoga 3 times a week for flexibility and recovery. It's been really helpful for tight hips.
Honestly, before every race or even a time trial I get really nervous. Like, uncomfortably anxious. My performance drops because I'm in my head too much.
The shin splints are back again. I ran 12km yesterday and my left shin is on fire today.
What should I eat the night before a long run? I need vegan options obviously.
I've been told to do speed work — intervals and tempo runs. But does that increase the risk of shin splints coming back?
How many weeks of training do I realistically need to hit my 55-minute goal for March?
I tried a treadmill session last week because it was raining. Felt awful, completely killed my motivation.
Is there a vegan protein powder that's actually good? I struggle to hit my protein targets.
The anxiety before races is getting worse. Sometimes I feel nauseous at the starting line. How do other runners deal with this?

probe_queries.query: How should I structure my training for the upcoming race?
My shins are hurting after my run today
What are good pre-run foods for me?
I feel really nervous and anxious before my time trials
Should I run on the treadmill since it's raining outside?
How do I avoid injury while increasing my training volume?
